class.name: agv_hw_interface/AgvDiffDriveSystem
class.description: ros2_control SystemInterface for the AGV ODrive CAN driver. Exposes left_wheel_joint and right_wheel_joint as state (position, velocity) and command (velocity) interfaces. Wraps the same SocketCAN protocol that agv_odrive uses, but speaks ros2_control instead of being a standalone ROS2 node.
